Politics.headline: Pakistan makes some transport free as fuel price jumps
Politics.detail: State-run public transport in Pakistan's capital and most populous province will be free for the coming month after the government drastically raised fuel prices due to the Iran war. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif back-pedalled late on Friday, saying he was reducing the levy and setting petrol prices at 378 rupees per litre.

Politics.headline: Iran hunts crashed US jet crew, media say one rescued
Politics.detail: Iranian and American forces were racing each other on Friday to recover the crew of the first US jet crashed in Iran since the start of the war, as Tehran said it had shot down the F-15 fighter. US media reported American special forces had rescued one of two crew members, and official television in Iran's south-western province of Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad aired footage of what appeared to be wreckage of the warplane.

Politics.headline: Trump's America, an impossible ally?
Politics.detail: Tensions remain high as a second U.S. warplane was shot down while conducting operations against Iran. An F-15 fighter jet and an A-10 attack plane were lost to hostile fire with one person still missing from the F-15 crash.

Politics.headline: SNP only party 'serious about winning' Holyrood election, Swinney claims
Politics.detail: First Minister John Swinney claims the SNP is the only party “serious about winning” the Scottish Parliament election and that Labour had now “given up the pretence” that it was trying to win a majority at Holyrood. He repeated his claims that Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar wanted to do a deal with Reform to become first minister – something both parties deny.

Politics.headline: Romania cuts diesel excise duty, introduces windfall tax on oil revenues
Politics.detail: The Romanian government has approved an emergency ordinance to reduce excise duties on diesel and introduced a solidarity tax on exceptional profits in the oil sector. Under the new measure, the excise duty on standard diesel sold domestically will be reduced by 30 bani (7 U.S. cents) per liter during the period from April 1 to June 30.

Finance & Economy.headline: US jobs market beats March expectations but February losses worse than first reported
Finance & Economy.detail: The US jobs market exceeded expectations in March, although February's losses were more significant than initially reported, according to The Guardian.

Finance & Economy.headline: 3 ways the Iran war is hitting Americans' pocketbooks
Finance & Economy.detail: The Iran war is beginning to impact American consumers financially, with the conflict seeping into the economy, according to CBS News.

Finance & Economy.headline: US economy created 178,000 jobs in March, a strong gain for labor market
Finance & Economy.detail: The U.S. economy added 178,000 jobs in March, signaling a robust labor market, with the report reflecting the period after the onset of the Iran war, which has put pressure on households and businesses, according to The Washington Post.

Finance & Economy.headline: China, Canada agree to hold economic, financial strategic dialogue in second half of this year
Finance & Economy.detail: China and Canada have agreed to conduct an Economic and Financial Strategic Dialogue in the latter half of the year, aiming to deepen cooperation in economy, trade, and finance and promote stable bilateral economic relations, according to China Daily.

Finance & Economy.headline: US Bonds Fall as Strong Jobs Data Undermines Fed Cut Outlook
Finance & Economy.detail: Bond traders are betting the Federal Reserve will hold interest rates steady this year, driven by a stabilizing US labor market and uncertainty over the economic impact of the war in the Middle East, according to Financial Post.

Technology.headline: Musk asks SpaceX IPO banks to buy Grok AI subscriptions, NYT reports
Technology.detail: Elon Musk is reportedly requiring banks working on SpaceX's planned IPO to purchase subscriptions to Grok, his AI chatbot, with some banks agreeing to spend tens of millions of dollars annually and integrate it into their IT systems. SpaceX is aiming to raise a record $75 billion in its IPO and boosted its target initial public offering valuation above $2 trillion.

Technology.headline: Central Asia Expands Tech Reach with New Hub in Southeast Asia
Technology.detail: Astana Hub, IT Park Uzbekistan, and Big Sky Capital have partnered to launch a technology hub in Malaysia, aiming to provide Central Asian B2B tech startups with a platform to expand into Southeast Asian markets. The hub will offer support including legal and business advice, fostering an ecosystem for startups to access the rapidly growing Southeast Asian market.

Technology.headline: Robots are coming to the 1819 Innovation Hub
Technology.detail: The University of Cincinnati's 1819 Innovation Hub is hosting the Future of Commerce: AI+Robotics Summit 2026, bringing together founders, corporate leaders, and innovators to explore the future of commerce. The summit will showcase how AI and next-generation robots can transform industries like logistics, manufacturing, transportation and agriculture.

Technology.headline: AI-Powered Cyberattacks Raise Alarm Among IT Leaders
Technology.detail: Nearly eight out of ten global IT decision-makers believe that artificial intelligence poses a significant security threat, as AI-driven attacks accelerate. AI is becoming a force multiplier for cybercriminals, helping threat actors automate phishing, malware development, and reconnaissance while accelerating the spread of attacks.

Technology.headline: Copilot Terms Claim Microsoft's AI Is for 'Entertainment Purposes Only'
Technology.detail: Microsoft's Copilot terms state that the AI is for entertainment purposes only, a disclosure similar to what you might hear before a psychic reading. The update, which flew under the radar, was noted by some users on social media this week.

Science.headline: This New Sensor Could Sniff Out Pneumonia on a Person's Breath
Science.detail: A new sensor technology may be able to detect pneumonia through a person's breath, offering a non-invasive diagnostic method.

Science.headline: Eerie Cosmic-Ray 'Cavity' Found Lurking in Earth-Moon Space
Science.detail: Scientists have discovered a peculiar cavity of cosmic rays existing in the space between Earth and the Moon, which raises questions about its formation and impact.

Science.headline: Scientists map how the body traps 'sleeping' tuberculosis
Science.detail: Researchers have created a map detailing how the human body contains dormant tuberculosis, offering insights for potential new treatments.

Science.headline: 3D root model captures mangroves' capacity to protect coastal communities from storm waves
Science.detail: A new 3D model illustrates the capacity of mangrove roots to shield coastal communities from the impact of storm waves.

Science.headline: Space Pioneer's Falcon 9 Rival Fails on Maiden Flight
Science.detail: Chinese commercial space startup Space Pioneer experienced a failure during the first flight of its Tianlong-3 rocket due to an anomaly during flight.

Health.headline: EPA moves to designate microplastics and pharmaceuticals as contaminants in drinking water
Health.detail: The EPA is taking steps to classify microplastics and pharmaceuticals as contaminants in drinking water, addressing growing concerns about their potential health impacts.

Health.headline: Raw dairy farm recalls some cheese products as FDA investigates E. coli outbreak
Health.detail: A California producer of raw milk and cheese products is recalling some of its products due to an ongoing E. coli outbreak being investigated by the FDA.

Health.headline: HHS To Examine Health Effects Of Tiny Plastic Particles That Leach Into Water
Health.detail: The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) will be examining the potential health effects of tiny plastic particles that leach into water sources.

Health.headline: Aging lungs may play a major role in why flu and COVID can become so dangerous for older adults
Health.detail: A new study reveals that aging lungs may play a major role in why flu and COVID can become so dangerous for older adults, as certain lung cells can trigger an exaggerated immune response.

Health.headline: A newly identified gene mutation may help explain why schizophrenia patients struggle to update their understanding of reality
Health.detail: A newly identified gene mutation may help explain why schizophrenia patients struggle to update their understanding of reality because the mutation disrupts a brain circuit involved in flexible thinking.

Sports.headline: South Carolina smothers UConn 62-48 to advance to NCAA title game, snaps Huskies' 54-game win streak
Sports.detail: South Carolina defeated UConn to advance to the NCAA title game, ending the Huskies' impressive 54-game winning streak.

Sports.headline: Two-time All-Pro cornerback Stephon Gilmore announces his retirement
Sports.detail: Stephon Gilmore, a two-time All-Pro cornerback, has announced his retirement from the NFL.

Sports.headline: Home runs by DeLauter and Arias in 7th inning propel Guardians to 4-1 victory over Cubs
Sports.detail: Home runs from Chase DeLauter and Angel Arias in the 7th inning led the Cleveland Guardians to a 4-1 victory over the Chicago Cubs.

Sports.headline: Geno Auriemma and Dawn Staley have tense postgame exchange after South Carolina shocks UConn in Final Four
Sports.detail: After South Carolina's victory over UConn in the Final Four, coaches Geno Auriemma and Dawn Staley had a tense exchange.

Sports.headline: Luka Doncic's injury could mean he's out of the NBA award race
Sports.detail: Luka Doncic's injury raises concerns about his participation in the NBA award race.

Entertainment.headline: BTS's 'Arirang' dips to No.4 on British Official Albums Chart
Entertainment.detail: K-pop powerhouse BTS ranked No. 4 on the British Official Albums Chart with its latest album, "Arirang," a week after debuting at the top spot. According to the latest chart released Friday, the group's fifth studio album moved down three places, trailing "This Music May Contain Hope" by Raye, Olivia Dean's "The Art of Loving" and Ye's "Bully."

Entertainment.headline: Judge dismisses Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims against Justin Baldoni
Entertainment.detail: A federal judge dismissed actor Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims in the legal battle between her and "It Ends With Us" director and her former co-star Justin Baldoni. However, a claim for retaliation was left intact.

Entertainment.headline: Ranbir Kapoor told 'Ramayana' stories to Raha after shoot, she would ask him, 'Did you shoot with Hanuman today?'
Entertainment.detail: Ranbir Kapoor, who is set to play Lord Ram in 'Ramayana', shared that he would tell stories about the shoot to his daughter Raha Kapoor, who was curious to know about the story and would ask if he shot with Hanuman. He expressed his blessing to be a part of the film, coinciding with his journey into fatherhood, and emphasized how this story is ingrained in their DNA and conscience.

Entertainment.headline: Ex-Turnstile guitarist charged with attempted second-degree murder of frontman's father
Entertainment.detail: Brady Ebert, ex-Turnstile guitarist, has been charged with attempted second-degree murder for allegedly hitting Brendan Yates's father with his car and driving off. Turnstile is an American rock band from Baltimore, Maryland.

Entertainment.headline: Broadway show halted as Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital mid‑performance
Entertainment.detail: Megan Thee Stallion was taken to the hospital mid-performance, which resulted in a Broadway show being halted. Her rep confirmed the hospitalization.

Crime & Justice.headline: Criminal court statistics quarterly: October to December 2025
Crime & Justice.detail: National statistics announcement about criminal court statistics from October to December 2025.

Crime & Justice.headline: Criminal court statistics quarterly: January to March 2026
Crime & Justice.detail: National statistics announcement about criminal court statistics from January to March 2026.

Crime & Justice.headline: Elmley Prison: action plan
Crime & Justice.detail: A policy paper regarding an action plan for Elmley Prison has been released.

Crime & Justice.headline: 2nd man arrested in drive-by shooting that killed 7-month-old girl
Crime & Justice.detail: Police say a second suspect in the stray-bullet killing of a 7-month-old baby on a Brooklyn street has been arrested in Pennsylvania.

Crime & Justice.headline: L.I. man accused of shooting sister with crossbow pleads not guilty to charges.
Crime & Justice.detail: A Long Island man who allegedly shot his sister with a crossbow has pleaded not guilty to the charges against him.

Education.headline: Extend fully paid maternity leave for UK teachers to stem exodus, union says
Education.detail: A union is calling for extended fully paid maternity leave for teachers in the UK to address the high rate of teachers leaving the profession.

Education.headline: Texas Education Agency names new inspector general as educator misconduct reports surge
Education.detail: The Texas Education Agency has appointed a new inspector general amidst a reported increase in cases of educator misconduct.

Education.headline: North Texas districts could lose thousands of students to school voucher program
Education.detail: School districts in North Texas face the possibility of losing a significant number of students because of a new school voucher program.

Education.headline: Education Department directs student loan borrowers in SAVE plan to prepare for repayment
Education.detail: The Education Department is instructing student loan borrowers enrolled in the SAVE plan to prepare for resuming their repayments.

Education.headline: Teachers often hate being observed. Mentoring a student-teacher has given me a new perspective.
Education.detail: Mentoring a student-teacher has given a teacher a new perspective on why teachers often dislike being observed.

Lifestyle.headline: Costco's hot dog-inspired bourbon triggers buying frenzy with $1,000 resale prices
Lifestyle.detail: Costco's new Kirkland Signature American Vodka is creating a stir, with some bottles being resold for significantly higher prices due to its unique flavor profile inspired by the store's popular hot dogs.

Lifestyle.headline: A New York Fashion Week Moment Is Turning the Rising Brand DRIIVIIN Into a Global Conversation
Lifestyle.detail: DRIIVIIN, a tech-backed fashion brand, launched its Spring/Summer 2026 collection, I WAS HERE, at New York Fashion Week, introducing the concept of Cultural Luxury, which emphasizes meaning, purpose, and emotional connection in fashion. The collection originated from a panoramic painting of New York City, reimagined by artist and designer Peace Simon, and aims to build a community centered around storytelling, identity, and inspiration.

Lifestyle.headline: These Malaysians share the painful experience of stepping away from family
Lifestyle.detail: The decision to sever family ties is a gradual process when conflicts remain unresolved, often stemming from prolonged tension or emotional wounds, according to Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (UKM) social science and humanities lecturer Dr Mohd Haikal Anuar Adnan. Family therapist Vicky Hooi adds that this decision is years in the making and not an impulsive action.

Lifestyle.headline: From Screen to Plate: CJ Foods' Cuisine. K Brings the Magic of Netflix Hit 'Bon Appétit, Your Majesty' to U.S. Kitchens
Lifestyle.detail: CJ Foods is bringing dishes from the Netflix show 'Bon Appétit, Your Majesty' to life with cooking classes in Los Angeles and New York City, led by Michelin-trained chefs, as part of the 'Touring K-Arts' program. Participants will learn to recreate iconic K-Food moments from the drama, bridging the gap between K-Content fans and authentic Korean flavors.

Lifestyle.headline: Risis turns 50: How the Singapore heritage jewellery brand is evolving for a new generation
Lifestyle.detail: As Risis celebrates its 50th anniversary, CEO Verene Ng is leading the Singapore heritage brand known for its gold-plated orchids towards a new identity shaped by fashion and global ambition. The brand is evolving to appeal to a new generation while maintaining its heritage.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: US, China and Honduras' stance
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Honduran National Congress approved a motion urging a report on agreements with China and an analysis of relations, following allegations of Cuban consular officials representing Honduras in China, signaling concern over the relationship's direction and management.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Watching for signs of price gouging
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Influenced by the conflict in the Middle East, the prices of some raw materials have surged, leading not only to higher prices for everyday plastic packaging materials, but also potential shortages.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Letters to The Editor — April 4, 2026
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Letters to the editor discussing various topics of interest to the general public.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: HEADLINES: Oil surge beyond $150/barrel feared
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Today's editorial analyzes the latest developments of the Middle East war among the United States, Israel, and Iran.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Courtroom interpretation rights
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The National Human Rights Commission released a report emphasizing that people on trial who require interpreters or publicly appointed lawyers are often disadvantaged by structural weaknesses within Taiwan's judicial system.

Zimbabwe.headline: Chamisa fumes over Mnangagwa term chaos
Zimbabwe.detail: Nelson Chamisa has criticized the proposed Constitutional Amendment Bill, which could extend President Mnangagwa's term.

Zimbabwe.headline: Fuel price hike worsens food crisis for vulnerable Zimbos
Zimbabwe.detail: A recent fuel price increase is expected to exacerbate the food crisis affecting vulnerable populations in Zimbabwe.

Zimbabwe.headline: 30K smart water meters installed in Harare
Zimbabwe.detail: The city of Harare has installed 30,000 smart water meters as part of an effort to improve water management and billing accuracy.

Zimbabwe.headline: Extradited US$4m armed robbery suspect denied bail
Zimbabwe.detail: A suspect extradited for a US$4 million armed robbery has been denied bail.

Zimbabwe.headline: 4 robbery suspects killed in shootout with cops
Zimbabwe.detail: Four suspected robbers were killed in a shootout with law enforcement officers.
